scripts.check: bun run version:check && bun run check:code
scripts.check:code: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test
scripts.//test-split: multi-tab runs in its OWN bun process (test:isolated), NOT for a syncular race — that cross-operation interleaving race is fixed in the core (SyncClient #opChain). The residual is a bun 1.3.14 native crash: many Worker OS-threads each opening bun:sqlite under BroadcastChannel/fetch load intermittently segfaults the runtime (repros with zero syncular code; browsers use per-worker OPFS files so it cannot happen in production). Isolation reduces cross-file thread contention. Collapse this split once bun fixes the segfault. See ROADMAP block 4.
scripts.test: bun run test:main && bun run test:isolated
scripts.test:isolated: bun test packages/web-client/test/multi-tab.test.ts || (echo 'retrying once: documented bun-native worker+sqlite corruption, see ROADMAP block 4' && bun test packages/web-client/test/multi-tab.test.ts)
scripts.build:packages: bun run clean:packages && for p in core crypto server server-hono server-workers crdt-yjs web-client react typegen tauri testing create-app; do echo "building @ packages/$p" && tsc -p packages/$p/tsconfig.build.json || exit 1; done && bun run fix:esm && bun run build:bins
scripts.build:sites: bun run version:check && bun run --cwd apps/docs build && bun run --cwd apps/demo build:static
scripts.fix:esm: node scripts/fix-esm-extensions.mjs packages/core/dist packages/crypto/dist packages/server/dist packages/server-hono/dist packages/server-workers/dist packages/crdt-yjs/dist packages/web-client/dist packages/react/dist packages/typegen/dist packages/tauri/dist packages/testing/dist packages/create-app/dist
